backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing contact inquiries with admin‑gated query access and a submission method that prevents duplicates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to files, components, and test IDs for the marketing website project.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-style mapping of frontend file paths to short summaries describing their roles in the marketing site.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS variables for light/dark themes and applying global background/foreground styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component composing navigation, all marketing sections, and the footer.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Contac: Contact form component with validation, submission via hook, and success/error UI states.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Footer: Footer with brand info, quick navigation, contact details, and attribution link.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Header: Responsive header navigation with scroll detection, logo, desktop/mobile menus, and smooth section scrolling.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Market: Reusable layout and UI primitives including Container, SectionHeading, and PrimaryButton wrappers.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Sectio: Provides Hero and About marketing sections with scroll-to-element behavior, background imagery, and value props cards.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context/provider handling auth client creation, login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook to fetch all contact inquiries using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitContactInqui: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form inquiries and invalidating related queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus theme variables for light/dark modes and global typography, borders, and focus states.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling custom colors, typography, animations, and container settings with plugins.
project_state.json: Contains the full project state including versions, features, pending requests, and required image assets for the Jo enterprises website. Defines existing features, new backend requirements, and general project metadata.
